description: You are a simulation engineer at a logistics automation company working on a Python 2D physics engine ('box_sim') located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/box_sim. The engine is currently unstable, with objects gaining energy after collisions, flying off belts, and sinking into each other. Resolve the issues with time integration, collision impulse calculations, and positional correction so that all tests pass with 'pytest'. Do not modify the test files or the vector math library (engine/vectors.py). The simulation must use standard Newtonian mechanics (Impulse-based resolution).
